author: codex-agent

patch.value: Cross-command hardening for deadline and date parsing inputs.
Expand deadline/date parsing to accept month-relative values and flexible date strings while preserving deterministic behavior and backward compatibility.

CLI accepts +6m and flexible date strings (including forms like 2026-03-31T13-59) across create/update/list/search/calendar/reminder/event paths, persists normalized ISO timestamps, preserves existing accepted inputs, and ships with updated docs plus full regression evidence.
Parser behavior and call-sites are mapped with explicit no-regression guardrails.
Reduces friction from strict date-format assumptions
Fewer usage failures in date-driven workflows
Deterministic flexible date parsing across CLI surfaces
Users are hitting Invalid deadline value errors for practical inputs like +6m and 2026-03-31T13-59.
Existing users keep current behavior while additional date inputs are accepted.

value.author: codex-agent
